item.title: I probably shouldn’t have made this... but I did. Lady Liberty got a glow-up, grabbed her phone, and now she’s taking selfies for instagram. Sculpted, 3D printed, and painted by me.. because apparently, this is how I use my free time now.
item.dc:creator: Alexgundru

item.title: My Jinx cosplay :3
item.description: Been wanting to cosplay Jinx for such a long time now and I finally did c: Fishbones took about 40-50 hours (and some tears) to make and wasn’t even the hardest part of this cosplay, making the wig was way worse lol. Either way I hope you like it <3 For more cosplays instagram.com/tanukiicos
item.dc:creator: tanukiicos

item.title: What Happened Today #107
item.description: From a deadly terrorist bombing in Palm Springs to devastating tornadoes tracked by understaffed weather offices, Trump's America faces real-life violence while his administration quietly enables more. Now they're lifting bans on rapid-fire gun triggers, teaching debunked election fraud claims in classrooms, and amplifying assassination conspiracy theories online. Meanwhile, his "solution" to the economic pain of tariffs? Telling Walmart to simply "eat the costs" rather than pass them to already struggling consumers. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage at GovBrief.Today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/palm-springs-bombing 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-call-putin 3. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-continue-talks 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-walmart-eat-tariffs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/novavax-approval-conditions 6. https://go.govbrief.today/weather-offices-closed 7. https://go.govbrief.today/oklahoma-schools-misinformation 8. https://go.govbrief.today/forced-reset-triggers 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-comey-assassination 10. https://go.govbrief.today/court-blocks-union 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-conspiracy-clinton 12. https://go.govbrief.today/spacex-teachers-doge
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Sherman is laughing
item.description: Finally some good news A source https://www.theadvocate.com/baton_rouge/news/history-nottoway-resort-louisiana/article_02f7e493-96cf-4a79-b76b-20614525a274.html
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: From childhood’s hour I have not been - As others were, I have not seen - As others saw, I could not bring - My passions from a common spring
item.description:
From the same source I have not taken My sorrow, I could not awaken
My heart to joy at the same tone And all I lov’d, I lov’d alone
Then, in my childhood, in the dawn Of a most stormy life, was drawn
From ev’ry depth of good and ill The mystery which binds me still
From the torrent, or the fountain From the red cliff of the mountain
From the sun that ’round me roll’d In its autumn tint of gold
From the lightning in the sky As it pass’d me flying by
From the thunder, and the storm And the cloud that took the form
(When the rest of Heaven was blue) Of a demon in my view
POEM: Edgar Allan Poe - Alone
SOURCE: https://twoucan.com/profile/ave_droid
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: DOGE strikes again ....
item.description: Cuts to the NWS led to a delayed tornado warning at 3:00am. This resulted in at least 18 deaths. DOGE cutting costs to fund tax breaks for the wealthy and supposedly reduce the Deficit. The tragic deaths and ridiculous expenditures of tax payer money didn’t have to happen.
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Day 18 of mermay, melon! [OC]
item.description:
Honey melon to be exact! I love eel mermaids so much, their tails are a hoot to draw ;D also melon with Prosciutto is so good, highly recommend that combo if you haven’t tried it yet!
The melon theme will continue tomorrow!!
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives
